title: Festival Stage Roof-Truss Rigging Sizing
strategies: trivial: uniform a_max sizing (evaluator baseline, always feasible on all three gates) -> ~0.1

greedy: buckling-aware fully-stressed design (area=|force|/sigma, then thicken compression struts to their Euler-buckling area); passes yield+buckling but busts the global sag gate on tight instances -> 0 there, ~0.4 on loose instances

strong: buckling-aware fully-stressed design + global displacement repair (uniformly scale all areas up until the sag limit is met); feasible on all three gates everywhere and far lighter than baseline -> ~0.32-0.41
invalid: uniform a_min sizing -> stresses exceed yield everywhere -> 0
